definition: Two-part task: (1) Name or spot the item/concept/characteristic, then (2) give reasons or explain its significance. Both parts are required.

expected_response.format: [Identified item/concept]: [Brief name] + [Explanation of why it matters or how it functions]
do: Clearly name what you are identifying
Then explain its significance or function
do_not: Only explain without clearly identifying first

mark_expectation: 1 mark for correct identification; additional marks for quality of explanation
question_stem_examples: Identify and explain the role of malolactic bacteria in winemaking.
Identify two characteristics of Riesling grapes and explain why each is relevant to wine style.
mentor_hint: Split your answer: PART 1: 'This is [X]' (definition/identification). PART 2: 'It matters because...' or 'Its function is...'. Both parts must be clear.
